name: io.github.wkalidev/multichain-mcp
description: MCP server for AI agents — Stacks, Celo, and Base in one package. Free tier: balances and live prices. Pro: portfolio aggregation and unsigned transfers. Team: unsigned ERC-20 token deployment.
title: multichain-mcp

environmentVariables.name: MULTICHAIN_LICENSE_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Optional Lemon Squeezy license key. Omit to run on the Free tier (get_balance, get_prices). Unlocks get_portfolio and prepare_transfer on Pro, plus deploy_token on Team.
